workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and generate all documents in {document_output_language}
🔄 REFRESH STORY - Thin wrapper around create-story workflow
This workflow DELEGATES to create-story with mode="refresh" for unified story management

step.goal: Delegate to create-story in refresh mode

workflow.step:
Invoke create-story workflow with the following parameters: - mode: "refresh" - story_path: {{story_path}} (if provided by user)
The create-story workflow handles all refresh logic: - Loading existing story file - Analyzing completed stories and git history - Gathering latest codebase context - Updating Dev Notes with implementation intelligence - Preserving user edits while refreshing context
Execute: create-story(mode="refresh", story_path={{story_path}})
